NAVAREA XIX 18/15
BARENTS SEA
1. ROCKET LAUNCHING SCHEDULED 1100 TO 1130 UTC 27 AND 28 FEB.
AREA DANGEROUS TO NAVIGATION BOUNDED BY:
   A. 76-30N 22-00E 
   B. 75-20N 24-40E 
   C. 74-50N 21-40E 
   D. 75-50N 18-40E
VESSELS TO REMAIN CLEAR OF THIS AREA.
2. CANCEL THIS WARNINGS 281230 UTC FEB 2015.
